Default Prove-Up Hearing Set In Scd 218 On Oct.15,2002 At 9:00 Am
Off Calendar Oct-17-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerks: P.Dias/J. Stokes; Reporter: Helen A. Sorep-Matley. Joseph C. Tursi, Esq, appeared for the plaintiff. Default entered against Jimmy To Ha Quan, an individual and Y.N. Wong Quan. Petitioner was sworn and examined. The Court takes evidence and good cause appearing, grants judgment as prayed for. (see imaged document. Judgment signed in open court.
